title: The Real Test of a Godly Man Is How He Treats the Waiter
caption:
The real test of a godly man isn't how he treats his boss. It's how he treats the waiter.

The intern. The cashier. The guy refilling your coffee. How you treat someone with nothing to offer you says more about your character than how you treat anyone who can advance you.

Christ ate with tax collectors, not the men who could get him somewhere. Generosity and patience toward someone who can't pay you back, who can't be fired for slowing down your line, are two of the few tests you can't fake in the moment.

And if you're warm to his face and sharp about him the second he leaves the room, you haven't shown two versions of yourself. You've shown which one is real.

#faith #integrity #christianmen #manofgod #character #realtalk
